metadata.description:
For the full Collection of lectures and interviews from Bishop Richard Williamson visit: https://archive.org/details/bishop-williamson-video-collection

Visit Bishop Williamson's website which features a weekly essay compiled or written by himself: https://stmarcelinitiative.com/eleison-comments/

Check the channel for further content
